pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F. This is a pretty wild setup, right? I'm mostly here to try and do something good for my family back home, what about you?
Hey F, I’m I. It really is. I’m here for the same reason—to win enough to take care of my people back home.
Glad to hear we're on the same page; it definitely makes the stakes feel higher when it’s for family.
Exactly. Failure isn't really an option when you know people are counting on you.
I hear that. It’s a lot of pressure, but it keeps me focused. What kind of work do you do back home?
I’ve been working a couple of retail jobs, just trying to keep things afloat, but it’s definitely a grind. What about you?
I've been working warehouse shifts, mostly nights. It’s exhausting, but you do what you have to for the people you love.
I totally get that. Those night shifts are brutal, but hopefully, after this, we won't have to push ourselves that hard anymore.
That’s the goal. I’m honestly just tired of being tired, you know? Let’s hope we can both make it happen.
I feel that deeply. Let's hope this game changes things for both of us. Good luck out there.
Thanks, I appreciate that. Same to you—I really hope we both come out on top for our families. See you around.

post_game.message: Great coordination! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share and reached the best possible outcome.
Great job! I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share.
It was a pleasure collaborating with you. I'm glad we both reached the $10,000 outcome successfully.
